row.context: Heuristic guideline (75/25 split of 16,384 max context). No empirical study performed. For PA: irrelevant (output is 3-10 tokens). For AO: conversational output naturally varies. For USE-CASE-005: not yet in production.

decision.question: Input/output split row disposition

options.option: Lock as advisory guideline with explicit 'not empirically optimized' caveat.
Remove the row entirely (no component enforces it).

decision.rationale: Preserves the heuristic for future USE-CASE-005 integration. Explicit caveat prevents misinterpretation as empirically tuned. Zero code impact.

decision.question: AO/CODE max_new_tokens disposition

options.option: Lock at context-window-limit (16,384 minus input tokens).

decision.rationale: Production currently runs Qwen3-1.7B. No AO/CODE empirical data on Qwen3-14B exists yet. Task 5 upgrades both to 14B — that is the correct point to tune max_new_tokens for these components. Avoids locking a value predicted to change.

decision.question: Update §0 status table for all Task 4 rows
decision.rationale: Tasks 4.1–4.9 rows already updated to COMPLETE as of this session. Task 4.10 row should be updated to COMPLETE upon milestone execution.

scope_request.title: Workload Profile Lock + ADR-012 §2.2 Finalization
scope_request.note: No code changes. No tests to run. All deliverables are documentation artifacts.
scope_request.objective: Close out Task 4 by: (1) locking all remaining EVALUATING parameters in ADR-012 §2.2 to zero EVALUATING rows, (2) compiling final per-component workload profile tables, (3) generating the Task 4 decision registry evidence artifact (DEC-01 through DEC-10), and (4) recording the Task 4 closure milestone in governance documents.

deliverable.detail: - Input/output split: change status from EVALUATING to ADVISORY (per Q-1). Add note: "Heuristic guideline, not empirically optimized. Revisit if output truncation observed in production." - GenConfig fields: change composite row status from EVALUATING to LOCKED. Append note clarifying that all sub-parameters are individually locked or deferred: PA max_new_tokens=10 LOCKED (DEC-08), stop_token_ids LOCKED (§2.4), AO/CODE max_new_tokens DEFERRED_TO_TASK5 (per Q-2). - After these changes: ZERO EVALUATING rows remain in §2.2.

Three tables (PA, AO, CODE) compiling every locked parameter with decision ID and evidence source. Use Task4.10_SCOPE_OUTLINE.md §3 tables as the template. Add header note: "These profiles represent the Task 4 exit state. Values marked DEFERRED_TO_TASK5 will be resolved during Task 5 model upgrade."

deliverable.action: Create Task 4 decision registry evidence artifact
deliverable.detail: Structured JSON with: - "decisions": array of DEC-01 through DEC-10, each with id, value, task_source, evidence_artifact, lock_date - "evaluating_resolved": array of [input_output_split, genconfig_fields] with before/after status and rationale - "workload_profiles": { "pa": {...}, "ao": {...}, "code": {...} } - "task4_closure": { "total_sub_sessions": 11, "total_decisions": 10, "total_evidence_artifacts": count, "date_started", "date_closed" }
Title: "Task 4.10: Workload Profile Lock + ADR-012 §2.2 Finalization" Type: DOCS-ONLY. Record all deliverables, decisions resolved, zero EVALUATING rows assertion. Reference D-3 evidence artifact.
DOCS-ONLY milestone. Record deliverables, EVALUATING→LOCKED/ADVISORY/DEFERRED transitions, zero EVALUATING assertion. Update branch/commit.

Mark Task 4.10 as COMPLETE with commit hash, LEDGER Entry 28, evidence artifact. Update status header to reflect Task 4 CLOSED (only 4.11 security hardening remains, which is a separate pre-Task-5 gate, not a Task 4 configuration study item).
Change ADR-012 status from "ACCEPTED — Configuration Optimization In Progress" to "ACCEPTED — Configuration Locked (Task 4 Complete)".

constraints.constraint: ZERO production code changes. This is a documentation-only milestone.
After D-1 completes, ADR-012 §2.2 must contain ZERO rows with status EVALUATING.
All 10 locked decisions (DEC-01 through DEC-10) must appear in D-3 with evidence citations.
Workload profile tables in D-2 must cover PA, AO, and CODE (USE-CASE-005) components.
DEFERRED_TO_TASK5 rows must include explicit justification for deferral.
Do NOT modify any .py, .json evidence, or test files.

command.description: Confirm zero EVALUATING rows in ADR-012

attachment.reason: SDO's original scope outline with Q-1/Q-2/Q-3 analysis and workload profile table templates
Target document for D-1, D-2, D-7. Contains current §2.2 EVALUATING rows to be resolved.
Master Task 4 tracking doc. §0 table for D-6 update.
Target for D-4 (Entry 28). Contains Entries 13-27 for cross-reference.
Target for D-5 (§1.23). Contains §1.14–§1.22 for Task 4 history.
Project governance, phase directives, coding standards.
Task 4.9d final metrics for cross-reference in evidence artifact.
